2026-04-09T19:03:04.7871665Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-09T19:03:04.7872106Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-09T19:03:04.7872470Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-09T19:03:04.7872775Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-09T19:03:04.7873011Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-09T19:03:04.7873168Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
